attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT ETL_ID,
       DELETE_FLAG,
       ID,
       ISDELETED,
       NAME,
       CURRENCYISOCODE,
       CREATEDDATE,
       CREATEDBYID,
       LASTMODIFIEDDATE,
       LASTMODIFIEDBYID,
       SYSTEMMODSTAMP,
       MAYEDIT,
       ISLOCKED,
       AT_EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE__C,
       AT_PRODUCT__C,
       PSS__C,
       AT_EXPECTED_PRODUCT__C,
       AT_EXPECTED_SERVICE__C,
       AT_FORECAST_STATUS__C,
       AT_PARTNER__C,
       AT_SUB_TECHNOLOGY__C,
       AT_TECHNOLOGY__C,
       AT_TEAM__C,
       AT_OPTIONAL_1__C,
       AT_OPTIONAL_2__C,
       AT_NEXT_STEP__C,
       AT_OTHER_PARTNER__C,
       OPPORTUNITY__C,
       AT_NEXT_STEP_DATE__C,
       AT_COMPETITOR__C,
       AT_OTHER_COMPETITOR__C,
       AT_FLAGS__C,
       ACCOUNT_NAME__C,
       AT_NO_OF_DAYS_OVERDUE__C,
       DEAL_ID__C,
       EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE__C,
       EXPECTED_PRODUCT_000__C,
       EXPECTED_SERVICE_000__C,
       FORECAST_STATUS__C,
       OPPORTUNITY_STATUS__C,
       STAGE__C,
       PSS_WORKSPACE_STATUS__C,
       FORECAST_POSITION_ID__C,
       FY_START_DATE_PSS__C,
       FY_COPY_PSS__C,
       FISCAL_WEEK_PSS__C,
       FY_EXTRA_WEEK_PSS__C,
       FISCAL_YEAR_PSS__C,
       FISCAL_QUARTER_PSS__C,
       FISCAL_MONTH_OF_QTR_PSS__C,
       FISCAL_MONTH_PSS__C,
       FISCAL_WEEK_OF_MONTH_PSS__C,
       FISCAL_PERIOD_PSS__C,
       BUSINESS_DRIVER__C,
       SOLUTION_OFFER__C,
       APPLICATION__C,
       ADDITIONAL_USE_CASE_INFO__C,
       DEPLOYMENT_NO__C,
       DATA_SOURCE_NAME__C,
       PSS_EMAIL__C,
       PSS_ALIAS__C,
       SYNC_STATUS__C,
       SYNC_WITH_OPPORTUNITY__C,
       OPPORTUNITY_TERRITORY_LEVELS,
       PSS_EXPECTED_TOTAL_VALUE_000_S,
       BATCH_ID,
       ACTION_CODE,
       CREATE_DATETIME,
       'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
  FROM $$STGDB.ST_AT_WORKSPACE__C STG
 WHERE    NOT EXISTS
             (SELECT 1
                FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_OPPORTUNITY OPTY
               WHERE STG.OPPORTUNITY__C = OPTY.SFDC_OPPORTUNITY_ID)
       OR NOT EXISTS
             (SELECT 1
                FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY PTY
              -- WHERE COALESCE (STG.PSS_ALIAS__C, 'UNKNOWN') = PTY.CEC_ID)
			   WHERE COALESCE ((SELECT SUBSTR(STG.PSS_EMAIL__C, 1, INSTR(STG.PSS_EMAIL__C, '@')-1)), 'UNKNOWN') = PTY.CEC_ID)
       OR NOT EXISTS
             (SELECT 1
                		FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY CUR
                WHERE STG.CURRENCYISOCODE = CUR.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE)
       OR NOT EXISTS
             (SELECT 1
                FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_PSS_OPPORTUNITY_ASSESSMENT SMO
               WHERE STG.ID = SMO.SFDC_WORKSPACE_ID)

SELECT SMO.PSS_OPPORTUNITY_ASSESSMENT_KEY,
       COALESCE (PTY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999) AS BK_PSS_AGENT_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
       COALESCE (OPTY.OPPORTUNITY_KEY, -999) AS BK_OPPORTUNITY_KEY,
	   COALESCE(OPTY.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, -999) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
       CAST ( COALESCE (CREATEDDATE, TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00') AS TIMESTAMP (0)) AS BK_PSS_ASSESSMENT_CREATED_DTM,
       CUR.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE AS ISO_CURRENCY_CD,
       COALESCE (STEX.AT_TEAM__C, 'UNKNOWN') AS PSS_TEAM_NAME,
       CAST (COALESCE (AT_EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE__C, DATE '1900-01-01') AS DATE) AS PSS_EXPECTED_BOOK_DT,
       COALESCE (STEX.AT_FORECAST_STATUS__C, 'UNKNOWN') AS FORECAST_STATUS_CD,
       COALESCE (STEX.PSS_WORKSPACE_STATUS__C, 'UNKNOWN')  AS PSS_ASSESSMENT_STATUS_CD,
       COALESCE (STEX.SYNC_WITH_OPPORTUNITY__C, '=')  AS SYNC_WITH_OPPORTUNITY_FLG,
       STEX.SYNC_STATUS__C AS SYNC_STATUS_DESCR,
       STEX.BUSINESS_DRIVER__C AS BUSINESS_DRIVER_DESCR,
       STEX.SOLUTION_OFFER__C AS SOLUTION_OFFER_DESCR,
       STEX.APPLICATION__C AS APPLICATION_ENVIRONMENT_DESCR,
       COALESCE (STEX.DELETE_FLAG, 'N') AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
       STEX.ID AS SFDC_WORKSPACE_ID,
       CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
       USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
       CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
       USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
       -999 AS PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY,
	   COALESCE(STEX.AT_OPTIONAL_1__C , 'UNKNOWN') AS PSS_OPTIONAL_CMT,
       'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
       'I' AS DML_TYPE
  FROM (SELECT CREATEDDATE,
               AT_TEAM__C,
               AT_FORECAST_STATUS__C,
               AT_EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE__C,
               PSS_WORKSPACE_STATUS__C,
               SYNC_WITH_OPPORTUNITY__C,
               SYNC_STATUS__C,
               BUSINESS_DRIVER__C,
               SOLUTION_OFFER__C,
               APPLICATION__C,
               DELETE_FLAG,
               ID,
               AT_PARTNER__C,
               OPPORTUNITY__C,
               PSS_ALIAS__C,
			   PSS_EMAIL__C,
               CURRENCYISOCODE,
			   AT_OPTIONAL_1__C
          FROM $$STGDB.ST_AT_WORKSPACE__C
        UNION ALL
        SELECT CREATEDDATE,
               AT_TEAM__C,
               AT_FORECAST_STATUS__C,
               AT_EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE__C,
               PSS_WORKSPACE_STATUS__C,
               SYNC_WITH_OPPORTUNITY__C,
               SYNC_STATUS__C,
               BUSINESS_DRIVER__C,
               SOLUTION_OFFER__C,
               APPLICATION__C,
               DELETE_FLAG,
               ID,
               AT_PARTNER__C,
               OPPORTUNITY__C,
               PSS_ALIAS__C,
			   PSS_EMAIL__C,
               CURRENCYISOCODE,
			   AT_OPTIONAL_1__C
          FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_AT_WORKSPACE__C
         WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI') STEX
       LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_OPPORTUNITY_PHASE OPTY
          ON STEX.OPPORTUNITY__C = OPTY.SFDC_OPPORTUNITY_PHASE_ID
       LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY PTY
          --ON COALESCE (STEX.PSS_ALIAS__C, 'UNKNOWN') = PTY.CEC_ID
		  ON COALESCE ((SELECT SUBSTR(STEX.PSS_EMAIL__C, 1, INSTR(STEX.PSS_EMAIL__C, '@')-1)), 'UNKNOWN') = PTY.CEC_ID
       LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY CUR
          ON COALESCE (STEX.CURRENCYISOCODE, 'UNK') =  CUR.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
       INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_PSS_OPPORTUNITY_ASSESSMENT SMO
          ON (STEX.ID = SMO.SFDC_WORKSPACE_ID)
	   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SMO.PSS_OPPORTUNITY_ASSESSMENT_KEY ORDER BY SMO.PSS_OPPORTUNITY_ASSESSMENT_KEY) = 1
